evals.prompt: I just cloned this repo and have no idea how it's structured. Can you explore the pbl plugin — I want to understand the full workflow, how the skills chain together, and what artifacts get produced. Focus on the spec-driven dev cycle.
evals.expected_output: A structured exploration.md saved to .powerball/specs/ with components table, mermaid architecture diagram, workflow description, pattern conventions, and dependency mapping
expectations: Creates a file at .powerball/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-*/exploration.md
The exploration.md contains a markdown table listing key components
The exploration.md contains a mermaid diagram (```mermaid block)
The exploration.md identifies the explore→plan→build→lodge workflow chain
The exploration.md mentions the .powerball/specs/ directory as artifact store
The exploration.md lists external dependencies (git worktrees, subagents)
The exploration.md documents at least 3 patterns or conventions used

evals.prompt: explore just the build skill — I want to understand how TDD enforcement works, what the verification loop does, and how code review fits in. I'm thinking of modifying the retry logic.
evals.expected_output: A focused exploration.md covering build skill internals: TDD protocol, verification-before-completion, code review dispatch, retry mechanism, and reference files
expectations: Creates exploration.md in .powerball/specs/
Documents the TDD Red-Green-Refactor cycle from references/tdd.md
Describes the verification loop with its 2-retry-per-checkpoint limit
Explains how the code-reviewer agent is dispatched and how critical vs minor issues are handled
References the three reference files (tdd.md, verification.md, testing-anti-patterns.md)
Identifies the task dependency ordering mechanism

evals.prompt: ok based on the exploration, I want to plan adding a 'resume' skill that can pick up a partially-completed build — say the user's session crashed mid-way through tasks.md. It should detect which tasks were done, which checklist items pass, and restart from the right point.
evals.expected_output: A plan.md with architecture decisions, risks, and out-of-scope items, plus tasks.md and checklist.md generated in parallel by sub-skills
expectations: Creates plan.md in the same spec directory
plan.md contains architecture decisions with rationale
plan.md includes a mermaid diagram showing the resume flow
plan.md identifies risks (e.g. partial git state, incomplete test runs)
tasks.md is created with phased tasks in dependency order
checklist.md is created with Functional, Quality, Integration sections
tasks.md and checklist.md cross-reference — every checklist category has supporting tasks

evals.prompt: plan a refactor of the sync skill — right now it only checks git diff but I want it to also verify that test coverage didn't drop and that no TODO comments were left behind. Keep it backward compatible.
evals.expected_output: A plan for extending sync with coverage checks and TODO scanning, maintaining the existing drift-detection interface
expectations: Creates plan.md with architecture decisions
Addresses backward compatibility as a design constraint
tasks.md breaks the work into phases (e.g. coverage integration, TODO scanning, existing behavior preservation)
checklist.md includes both new functionality checks and regression checks for existing sync behavior
plan.md explicitly lists what's out of scope

evals.prompt: build the resume skill from the plan we just created
evals.expected_output: Executes tasks from tasks.md in order using TDD, verifies checklist items, dispatches code review, produces working code in a git worktree
expectations: Attempts to create or use a git worktree for isolation
Reads tasks.md and processes tasks in dependency order
Writes tests before implementation code (TDD)
Marks tasks as [x] in tasks.md after completion
Runs checklist verification after tasks complete
Dispatches code-reviewer agent for review

evals.prompt: lodge the resume skill specs — everything should be done now
evals.expected_output: Invokes sync for drift detection, verifies all checklist items are checked, moves spec directory from .powerball/specs/ to .powerball/lodge/
expectations: Invokes sync skill to check for drift
Verifies all checklist items in checklist.md are [x]
Moves the spec directory to .powerball/lodge/
Reports the final archived location
